# MuleSoft Database Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.16) of Database Connector documentation.
> See [Database Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/db-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Database Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Configure Database Connector Data Types Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/db-connector/latest/database-configure-data-types.md)
- [Configure Use Bulk Copy for Database Connector SQL Server Connection](https://docs.mulesoft.com/db-connector/latest/database-configure-usebulkcopy.md)
- [Using Anypoint Code Builder to Configure Database Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/db-connector/latest/database-connector-acb.md)
- [Configure an Oracle TLS Database Connection](https://docs.mulesoft.com/db-connector/latest/database-connector-connection-secure-oracle.md)
- [Configure a Database Connection](https://docs.mulesoft.com/db-connector/latest/database-connector-connection.md)
- [Configure Driver Visibility using Mule Maven Plugin](https://docs.mulesoft.com/db-connector/latest/database-connector-driver-configuration.md)
- [Database Connector Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/db-connector/latest/database-connector-examples.md)
- [Execute DDL Statements Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/db-connector/latest/database-connector-execute-ddl.md)
- [Configuring Input and Output Parameters for Stored Procedures](https://docs.mulesoft.com/db-connector/latest/database-connector-input-output-parameters.md)
- [Configure Azure Active Directory Authentication for MS SQL Server using the Database Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/db-connector/latest/database-connector-integratedsecurity.md)
- [Query a Single Record from a Database Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/db-connector/latest/database-connector-query-single.md)
- [Query a Database Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/db-connector/latest/database-connector-select.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Database Connector 1.16](https://docs.mulesoft.com/db-connector/latest/database-connector-studio.md)
- [Configure Database Transactions Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/db-connector/latest/database-connector-transactions.md)
- [Troubleshooting Database Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/db-connector/latest/database-connector-troubleshooting.md)
- [Call Oracle Stored Procedure That Uses User-Defined Types (UDT) Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/db-connector/latest/database-connector-udt-stored-procedure.md)
- [Using XA Transactions in Database Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/db-connector/latest/database-connector-xa-transactions.md)
- [Database Connector XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/db-connector/latest/database-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [Database Connector Reference 1.16](https://docs.mulesoft.com/db-connector/latest/database-documentation.md)
- [Execute Bulk Operations Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/db-connector/latest/database-execute-bulk.md)
- [Execute a Script Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/db-connector/latest/database-execute-script.md)
- [Inserting Large File Content into a Table Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/db-connector/latest/database-insert-large-clob.md)
- [Insert, Update, and Delete Data from a Database Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/db-connector/latest/database-insert-update-delete.md)
- [Execute Stored Procedures Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/db-connector/latest/database-stored-procedure.md)
- [Database Connector 1.16](https://docs.mulesoft.com/db-connector/latest/index.md)
